title: Cuneiform Tablet #0008: Old Assyrian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
